purpose: Modern Portal 2 "Want You Gone" credits page. It loads the Portal 2 data and controller, defines the lyric and credit regions, adds animated Aperture UI chrome, embeds the Aperture logo SVG, exposes a volume slider, and includes a fullscreen #splash overlay that gates the credits sequence behind user click/keypress to satisfy modern autoplay policy.
invariants: cakedata.js must load before cake.js because cake.js reads global credits and lyrics.
#lyricstext, #creditstext, and #volume are DOM contract points for portal2/cake.js.
The inline volume handlers require cake to remain a global object.

The #splash element with id 'splash' is the autoplay-policy gate; portal2/cake.js queries it on DOMContentLoaded and dismisses it on click or Space, then tryStart() runs when both user-ready and canplaythrough have fired.
gotchas: The dense dot-pattern UI is hard-coded markup rather than generated by JavaScript.
Splash overlay styles are inline in <head>; removing the inline <style> block breaks the splash gate visually.
